molecule_record.mol_id: normalized slug (lowercased, gene-symbol preferred), unique key
molecule_record.name: canonical display name
molecule_record.gene_symbol: HGNC symbol if protein/gene, else null
molecule_record.uniprot: UniProt accession if known, else null
molecule_record.molecule_type: protein | gene | metabolite | lipid | lipoprotein | rna | peptide | ratio | cell | other
molecule_record.mechanism: one-line mechanistic role in Type 1 MI
molecule_record.mi_type_focus: list[str] tags: type1_atherothrombotic, type1_vs_type2, type2, ACS_general, STEMI, NSTEMI, unspecified_AMI
molecule_record.sources: list[str] of harvest tracks that found it: pubmed, openalex, geo, pride, clinicaltrials, opentargets, bionemo
